content: Hierarchical Virtual Context Management can be repurposed to structure the intrinsically rewarded exploration space of an Intrinsic Curiosity Module, where each hierarchical context layer encodes a progressively more abstract region of unexplored environment state that the curious agent can prioritize for targeted exploration. This structured exploration avoids the common ICM pitfall of infinite distraction by noisy, uninformative states by pruning low-value unexplored contexts nested within unpromising higher-level layers.
